proposal_title: AIOS Realty Proposal - Need a villa in Dubai Hills to buy for family living.
executive_pitch: The strongest option today is Vacant On Transfer | Greenbelt | Prime Location because it gives the best balance of location fit, operational readiness, and alignment with the residential move. The secondary play is Single Row | Corner Plot | Easy to View, which is stronger as a medium-term alternative than as the immediate lead recommendation.
sales_pitch: Lead with Vacant On Transfer | Greenbelt | Prime Location as the strongest aligned option based on the current brief. Keep Single Row | Corner Plot | Easy to View as the alternative and TurnKey | Full Lagoon View | Vastu-Compliant as the fallback while approvals, pricing, and fit-out scope are verified.

market_highlights: Shortlist should compare capital entry, delivery timeline, and future demand ramp-up.
Residential comparisons should weigh layout efficiency, building quality, and lifestyle access alongside entry price.
compliance_gates: Lease or purchase terms, building rules, and community restrictions must match the intended occupancy plan.
Service charges, parking allocation, and handover condition should be verified before commitment.
internal_evidence: AIOS acquisition index contains 289 rows matching the area signal 'dubai hills'.

next_steps: Confirm live availability, rent or sale terms, and current landlord or seller expectations before client send.
Collect floor plan, exact built-up area, parking details, and building or community rules for the shortlisted options.
Verify service charges, maintenance condition, and move-in timeline before presenting the lead recommendation as execution-ready.
